programme.title: Seven Last Words
programme.desc: This programme allows viewers to reflect on the Passion and Death of the Lord Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Veneration Of The Cross
programme.desc: This Good Friday devotion involves approaching a cross or crucifix and offering a gesture of respect that usually includes kneeling or bowing before the cross and then kissing it.

programme.title: TFC Kids Zone
programme.desc: A programme block filled with animated short stories, nursery rhymes and songs, as well as Filipino language lessons, TFC Kids' Zone promises a rich treasure trove of learning and discovery that parents and their young ones will find enriching and empowering.

programme.title: The B Side Ep 2
programme.desc: The B Side is back, and it's realer, deeper and more unfiltered than ever. This season, Bianca Gonzalez dives into the untold stories of your favourite artists.

programme.title: BRGY
programme.desc: BRGY features interesting and humorous stories about Filipinos and businesses in North America.

programme.title: Tao Po Ep 2
programme.desc: This programme features short narratives spanning a wide range of compelling topics from hot issues, inspiring human interest pieces, popular trends, profiles and entertainment.

programme.title: My Puhunan: Kaya Mo! Ep 2
programme.desc: Join award-winning ABS-CBN journalist Karen Davila, together with her co-host Migs Bustos, as they showcase inspiring success stories that aim to motivate viewers to reach their dreams!

programme.title: Chef RV's Kitchen EP 1
programme.desc: Chef RV's Kitchen brings you a collection of cooking and baking video tutorials by chef restaurateur and award-winning cookbook author, RV Manabat.

programme.title: Chef RV's Kitchen EP 2
programme.desc: Chef RV's Kitchen brings you a collection of cooking and baking video tutorials by chef restaurateur and award-winning cookbook author, RV Manabat.

programme.title: Mothballed: The Bataan Nuclear Power Plant 40 years Later
programme.desc: This 2025 documentary by journalist Jeff Canoy looks into the only nuclear power plant in Southeast Asia which was completed in the 1980s but was never commissioned.

programme.title: Commando: The Intense Training Of the PNP Special Action force
programme.desc: "Commando" is a 2025 documentary by journalist Michael Delizo that looks into the intense and gruelling training courses of the elite Special Action Force of the Philippine National Police. The documentary also follows the lives of troopers, and why they chose to serve the country through the PNP-SAF.

programme.title: Unloving U Ep 3
programme.desc: Step-siblings Fiona and Alfie are forced to live under one roof, where clashing personalities, music and family drama ignite a forbidden love that must stay secret even as it grows stronger.

programme.title: Unloving U Ep 4
programme.desc: Step-siblings Fiona and Alfie are forced to live under one roof, where clashing personalities, music and family drama ignite a forbidden love that must stay secret even as it grows stronger.

programme.title: BINI Chapter 2: Here With You
programme.desc: BINI's blooming journey continues. Join the nation's girl group as they embark on a regional tour and reflect on self-discovery in BINI Chapter 2: Here With You.

programme.title: Bakwit Boys
programme.desc: Four brothers who are forced to leave their hometown after it is devastated by a super typhoon struggle to bring music back into their lives. They then meet a city girl who discovers their talent and wants to help them succeed.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available.
